feat.name: Scorpion's Sting
feat.rules: While in Zaadesh's control range, friendly Faction models gain +2 MAT and +2 to their melee attack damage rolls and Defensive Strike. Scorpion's Sting lasts for one round. (Once per turn, when an enemy model advances into and ends its movement, or is placed in the melee range of a model with Defensive Strike, the model with Defensive Strike can immediately make one basic melee attack against it.)

feat.name: Hide in Sight
feat.rules: When an enemy model makes an attack roll against a friendly Faction model in Jalaam's control range, the enemy model rolls one less die. Hide in Sight lasts for one round.

feat.name: Instruments of War
feat.rules: While in Makeda's control range, friendly Faction models gain boosted melee attack rolls and cannot become knocked down. Instruments of War lasts for one round.

feat.name: Hand of the Ancients
feat.rules: All models are considered to be in Xerxis' control range. Friendly Faction models gain an additional die on attack and damage rolls. For each of those rolls, discard one die of your choice. Hand of the Ancients lasts for one turn.
